q1.question: Can I switch plans anytime?
q1.answer: Yes. Upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes take effect immediately.

q2.question: What's the Beta Bonus?
q2.answer: New free accounts get 3 months of Premium features during our beta phase. No credit card needed. After 3 months, you can upgrade or continue with Explorer.

q3.question: What payment methods do you accept?
q3.answer: Credit/debit cards via Stripe. Invoicing available for Architect and Constructor tiers.

q4.question: What's the Constructor plan?
q4.answer: Enterprise solution for construction companies. Unlimited projects, white-label branding, dedicated support. Custom pricing available for larger teams.

faq.metaDescription: Everything about designing modular homes with ModulCA — 3×3m module system, pricing, building permits for Romania & Netherlands, timeline, and more.
faq.ogDescription: Answers about the 3×3m module system, pricing, permits in Romania and the Netherlands, timelines, and construction.
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you want to know about designing modular homes, the ModulCA platform, building permits in Romania and the Netherlands, and the construction process itself.

cta.title: Still have questions?
cta.description: Our AI consultant can help you design, explain regulations, and estimate costs for free.

q1.question: What is ModulCA?
q1.answer: ModulCA is an AI-powered platform for designing modular wooden homes. You place 3×3m modules on your land, configure rooms and finishes, and receive 3D visualizations, AI renders, technical drawings, cost estimates, and connections to certified builders.

q2.question: Who is ModulCA for?
q2.answer: Anyone considering a modular or prefabricated home — primarily homeowners in Romania and the Netherlands, architects evaluating modular for client projects, and builders looking for a pipeline of pre-designed projects.

q3.question: Do I need architectural training?
q3.answer: No. The 13-step guided flow walks you from site selection to final construction drawings. The AI consultant explains regulations, dimensions, and trade-offs in plain language. Professional architects get advanced tools in the Architect tier.

q4.question: What browsers are supported?
q4.answer: Modern evergreen browsers — Chrome, Edge, Safari, Firefox, Brave. The 3D walkthrough needs WebGL 2 (standard since 2017). VR mode requires a WebXR-compatible headset (Meta Quest, Vision Pro).

q1.question: Why 3×3m modules?
q1.answer: 3×3m is the sweet spot for prefabrication: fits on standard trucks without wide-load permits, produces 9m² gross / ~7m² usable floor area (a typical single-room footprint), and plans cleanly into houses of 2–12 modules. Wall thickness is 15cm (interior) to 30cm (exterior insulated).

q2.question: Can I combine modules into open-plan spaces?
q2.answer: Yes. Interior walls between modules are optional and load-bearing columns are in the corners, so two adjacent modules give you 6×3m open space, three give you 9×3m, and so on. The configurator handles this automatically.

q3.question: What's the structural system?
q3.answer: CLT (cross-laminated timber), timber frame, or SIP panels depending on the builder. Foundations use screw piles (76–114mm shaft, 1.5–3m depth) so the house is removable and leaves minimal ground disturbance.

q4.question: Can I have multiple floors?
q4.answer: Yes — up to 2 floors are fully supported in the current release. Stair modules and structural reinforcement are handled by the configurator. Three-story designs are on the roadmap.

q1.question: How much does ModulCA cost?
q1.answer: Free tier (Explorer) is always free — design 1 project, 2 modules, basic visualization. Premium is €19.99/month (€199/year) for unlimited projects + AI renders. Architect is €49.99/month for pro tools (DWG/PDF export, white-label, vector knowledge base). Constructor is €149.90/month for builders (lead marketplace, team accounts).

q2.question: What does the modular house itself cost?
q2.answer: Typical turnkey cost in Romania is €1,000–2,000/m² depending on finish level. A 4-module house (~28m² usable) lands around €35–60k turnkey, foundation + transport included. Your ModulCA estimate is itemized — modules, foundation, transport, MEP, finishes, permits.

q3.question: Is there a free trial or beta discount?
q3.answer: During the Beta period (launching May 1, 2026), all registered users get 3 months of Premium features free. Beyond that, Explorer tier stays free forever with 1 project + 2 modules.

q4.question: Can I cancel anytime?
q4.answer: Yes. Subscriptions are monthly or yearly and cancelable from your account settings. You keep access until the end of the paid period, then downgrade to Explorer.

q1.question: Can I actually build a house I design in ModulCA?
q1.answer: Yes. ModulCA generates the drawings your architect needs for a building permit application (DTAC in Romania, Omgevingsvergunning in Netherlands). A certified architect signs the project, and you submit to the local municipality. Our certified partner architects can handle the submission for you.

q2.question: How does the Romanian building permit process work?
q2.answer: Six steps: (1) Certificat de Urbanism (CU) from primărie — 30 days, (2) Technical project (DTAC) signed by an architect, (3) Utility approvals (avize), (4) Autorizație de Construire — valid 12 months, (5) Construction with on-site supervision (diriginte de șantier), (6) Final inspection + cadastral registration (intabulare).

q3.question: How does the Dutch building permit process work?
q3.answer: Apply via the Omgevingsloket online portal. Since 2024, a Kwaliteitsborger (independent quality inspector) is required for new builds. Regular procedure is 8 weeks; extended procedure (for deviations from the local zoning plan) is 26 weeks. Bouwbesluit / BBL compliance is mandatory.

q4.question: Does ModulCA handle the permit paperwork?
q4.answer: Not directly — permit submission must be signed by a licensed architect or engineer in the country of construction. We connect you with certified partner architects in Romania and the Netherlands (in Architect and Constructor tiers), and we generate the drawings they need.

q1.question: How long does the whole process take?
q1.answer: Design in ModulCA: a few hours to a few days (depending on revisions). Permit process: 4–12 weeks in Romania, 8–26 weeks in Netherlands. Factory build: 6–10 weeks. On-site assembly: 2–5 days. Total: 3–8 months from signup to moving in.

q2.question: Can the house be moved later?
q2.answer: Yes — screw-pile foundations can be unscrewed and modules are bolted together (not glued or welded). Disassembly and relocation takes 2–4 days with a qualified team. This is a key reason for using ModulCA if you're on leased land or plan to move.

q3.question: How well-insulated are the modules?
q3.answer: ModulCA modules meet near-passive-house thermal performance — exterior wall U-value around 0.18 W/m²K (passive house is ≤0.15). Heating demand typically 15–25 kWh/m²·year. Builders can spec full passive standard on request.

q1.question: What AI does ModulCA use?
q1.answer: Multiple engines. For renders: FLUX, Stable Diffusion, DALL-E 3, Leonardo, Imagen 3, Runway — auto-selected by tier and subject. For the architectural consultant: Groq Llama 3.3 (free tier), OpenAI GPT-4o-mini (Premium), Anthropic Claude (Architect). All text generation is grounded in our 212-article knowledge base.

q2.question: Is my design data private?
q2.answer: Yes. Projects are stored in your account (Supabase EU region) and are never shared with third parties or used to train AI models. You can export or delete your data at any time.

q3.question: Can I export to CAD?
q3.answer: PDF export is available on all paid tiers. DWG export (for AutoCAD/Revit) is included in the Architect tier and above. SketchUp and IFC exports are on the roadmap.

romania.title: Romania modular market

moat.title: Technology moat
moat.p1: Only platform combining: 3D configurator + AI renders + structural engineering + regional permit guidance + builder marketplace
moat.p2: 212-article knowledge base grounds every AI consultant response in real regulations
moat.p3: Multi-provider AI strategy keeps gross margins above 80% at all tiers
moat.p4: EU-hosted (Supabase EU, Resend EU, Sentry EU, Fireworks EU) — GDPR-native

founder.title: From the founder
founder.p1: Housing in Central Europe has been priced out of reach for an entire generation. The fix is not more concrete — it's better-engineered, faster-built, more sustainable homes, designed with tools that today's buyers actually use.
founder.p2: ModulCA is the platform I wished existed when I spent years designing modular homes by hand. We combine the grid-based rigor of professional modular architecture with the accessibility of consumer software and the power of modern AI — so the next 100,000 Romanian and Dutch homes can be designed in an afternoon, permitted in weeks, and built in months instead of years.
